form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 5th of 9 at Canterbury Super Mdn-Sw on November 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Supermassive carrying 57.5kg at $14. Anticipating him to hit the ground running this campaign in a weaker maiden.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Saxon Warrior - Mad About You) on debut for Paul Perry. Fourth over 1000m in a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial on March 24. Wait and see what he can do.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old gelding by Anders out of Solar Kitty. At the most recent trial finished sixth at Rosehill over 900m. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 7 at Canberra Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1300m, on a slow track; 0.8 len behind Uber In carrying 58.5kg at $1.70. Shows ability and expected to improve. Will give them something to catch.

form.formComment: First starter. Three-year-old gelding by Savabeel out of Mary D'or NZD $ 350,000 (NZB 2024 Karaka - Book 1) purchase. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1208m at Warwick Farm March 30. Maybe later.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 2nd in a small field at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cge Mdn-Sw on March 23 over 1150m, slow going 1.75 len behind Newy with 58.5kg at $1.26. Previously second-up 2nd of 8 at Hawkesbury Mdn on August 12 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Ohope carrying 57.5kg at $2.15. Expensive yearling yet to live up to expectations but this looks a nice assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 300m hampered Ironheart when shifting out whilst weakening.

form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, held ground to the line 3rd of 7 at Randwick Kensington Super Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1300m, slow going 4.5 len behind Metallic Cat with 58.5kg at $81. Will derive great benefit from that experience and looks a solid top three chance again.

form.formComment: First starter by Xtravagant out of Bee purchased for AUD $ 22,500 (Inglis 2025 Classic Yearling Sale). Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Respect any positive betting push.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, 3rd of 11 at Muswellbrook 2yo Hcp on March 8 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Drumfire with 58kg at $21. Last start eased back early on 5th of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, slow going 4 len behind Under Focus carrying 56.5kg at $23. No surprise to see him break through.
